description_long: This object is a sculpted stone figure with a stylized, abstract human form, featuring a blocky head and a rectangular base. The body is simplified, with minimal detail, and the arms are suggested by subtle contours along the sides. The stone surface is matte and lightly textured, with a pale, off-white coloration and some visible speckling. The base is flat and broad, providing stability, while the head is squared off, giving the figure a geometric appearance. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative carvings, and the overall form is monolithic and solid, suggesting it is intended as a barrier or marker in an urban environment.
description: A pale, abstract stone figure with a blocky head and rectangular base, featuring minimal detail and a matte, lightly textured surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the squared head, broad shoulders, and the rectangular base, highlighting the geometric simplicity of the figure.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the elongated body, subtle arm contours, and the thickness of the base, emphasizing the figure's monolithic form.
description_view_2: The bottom view focuses on the flat, rectangular base and the underside of the figure, showing the solid construction.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same elongated body and base, with visible surface texture and the abstract form of the figure.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on pavement or landscaped area
attribute_pattern: No distinct pattern; surface is uniformly speckled with minor natural stone mottling.
attribute_weathering: Lightly weathered with a matte finish, showing minor surface pitting and no significant erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces and greenery, typically standing alone as a visual marker or barrier.
